title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.130 - Issues to be tried as in civil cases
text:
236.130.  Issues to be tried as in civil cases. — The court may thereupon direct issues to be made up and tried as in other civil cases, and if good cause be shown therefor, the court shall quash the proceedings and set aside the verdict.
(RSMo 1939 § 10298) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9169; 1919 § 7411; 1909 § 5468
